headline: Franklin Resources (BEN) Is Up 11.1% After Beating Q1 Estimates And Expanding Digital-Asset Push
summary: Franklin Resources recently reported past Q1 2026 results that exceeded earnings expectations, with assets under management rising to US$1.68 trillion on strong inflows and ongoing expansion in areas such as European private credit. Its push into digital assets, including the agreed acquisition of crypto firm 250 Digital and partnerships around tokenized products, signals a deeper shift toward technology-enabled asset management. Next, we’ll examine how Franklin Resources’ expanding...
